posts.author: Dyllanvgin (Dyllan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all,

Just wanting to gauge if there will be any interest in a comment/update syncing app that connects boards and marks updates via same name/item across boards but marks the updates by the user that wrote them (i.e. not whoever installed the app and there token). This would be a board view function on master/source board and you would connect boards from there to create the sync.

Thank you.
